member.summary: Uniform envelope wrapping all API responses.

member.summary: Indicates whether the operation succeeded.

member.summary: Human-readable message about the result.

member.summary: The response payload.

member.summary: Correlation/trace identifier for log correlation.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.DTOs.ApiResponse`1.Ok(`0,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a successful response with data.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.DTOs.ApiResponse`1.Fail(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a failure response with no data.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IAppDbContext
member.summary: Small abstraction over the EF Core DbContext so the Application layer doesn't depend on Infrastructure's concrete EF Core context type.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IAppDbContext.BeginTransactionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Begins a database transaction for the current unit of work.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IAppDbContext.AddOutboxMessageAsync(EnterpriseApp.Domain.Entities.OutboxMessage,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Adds an outbox message (to be dispatched by the outbox processor).

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IAppDbContext.SaveChangesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves all pending changes to the database.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IProductService
member.summary: Service interface for product operations.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IProductService.CreateProductAsync(EnterpriseApp.Application.DTOs.CreateProductRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new product and returns its read model.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IProductService.UpdateProductAsync(System.Guid,EnterpriseApp.Application.DTOs.UpdateProductRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing product.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IProductService.GetProductByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a product by identifier.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IProductService.GetProductsAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a paged list of active products.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IOrderService
member.summary: Service interface for order operations including multi-table transactions.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IOrderService.PlaceOrderAsync(EnterpriseApp.Application.DTOs.PlaceOrderRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Places a new order, deducting stock and recording an outbox event atomically.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IOrderService.GetOrderByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves an order by its identifier.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IAuthService
member.summary: Service interface for JWT authentication and token management.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IAuthService.LoginAsync(EnterpriseApp.Application.DTOs.LoginRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns access/refresh tokens.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IAuthService.RefreshTokenAsync(EnterpriseApp.Application.DTOs.RefreshTokenRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Rotates a refresh token and issues a new access token.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IAuthService.RevokeTokenAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Revokes a refresh token, preventing further use.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IProductQueryService
member.summary: Read-only query interface for products using Dapper.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IProductQueryService.GetByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a product read model by identifier using a raw SQL read path.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IProductQueryService.GetPagedAsync(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns a paged list of products using a raw SQL read path.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IOrderQueryService
member.summary: Read-only query interface for orders using Dapper.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IOrderQueryService.GetByIdAsync(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns an order with its line items using a raw SQL read path.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IBlobStorageService
member.summary: Blob storage abstraction for file uploads.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IBlobStorageService.UploadStreamAsync(System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Streams a file directly to blob storage without buffering in memory.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.IBlobStorageService.DeleteAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a blob by its URL or name.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.ICacheService
member.summary: Cache service abstraction backed by Redis.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.ICacheService.GetAsync``1(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a cached value by key, or null if not present.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.ICacheService.SetAsync``1(System.String,``0,System.TimeSpan,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Sets a value in cache with the specified expiry.

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.ICacheService.RemoveAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes a cached value by key.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.ISecretProvider
member.summary: Secret provider abstraction — retrieves secrets from a secure vault (e.g., Azure Key Vault, blob-based).

member.name: M:EnterpriseApp.Application.Interfaces.ISecretProvider.GetSecretAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a secret value by its name.

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Application.Services.AuthService
member.summary: Implements JWT authentication with refresh token rotation. Secrets are retrieved from , never from config files.
Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Application.Services.OrderService
member.summary: Implements order placement with multi-table transactions (Order + Product stock + Outbox) using EF Core transactions with a single SaveChanges call.
Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: T:EnterpriseApp.Application.Services.ProductService
member.summary: Implements product management operations. Write operations use EF Core via ; reads are delegated to the Dapper-based .
Initializes a new instance of .
